missions.title: Some Basic Principles of Organic Chemistry - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering tetravalency, hybridisation of carbon, shapes and more.

microtargets.title: Tetravalency
mustKnowFacts: Tetravalency is a fundamental subtopic of Some Basic Principles of Organic Chemistry.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Tetravalency for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Tetravalency during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Tetravalency.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Tetravalency.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Tetravalency.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Tetravalency.
What is a common trap associated with Tetravalency?
